---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: Suggest an idea, enhancement, or new feature for this portfolio.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

### Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm frustrated when [...]"

### Describe the Solution You'd Like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Describe the feature, style, 3D animation, or configuration option you want added.

### Describe Alternatives You've Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### Additional Context
Add any other context, mockup drawings, or references about the feature request here.
